testcase.name: test_roi_current_by_agent_cost_covers_channels
testcase.failure: tests/test_p0_unification.py:392: in test_roi_current_by_agent_cost_covers_channels assert isinstance(bac, dict) and bac, f"by_agent_cost missing/empty: {d}" E AssertionError: by_agent_cost missing/empty: {'hour_start': '2026-06-26T10:40:14.963761+00:00', 'hour_end': '2026-06-26T11:40:14.963761+00:00', 'phase': 'no_activity', 'roi': None, 'total_cost': 0.0, 'total_revenue': 0.0, 'by_type_cost': {}, 'by_agent_cost': {}, 'by_agent_revenue': {}, 'by_agent_roi': {}, 'alert': None, 'company_id': 'demo', 'created_at': '2026-06-26T11:40:14.965686+00:00'} E assert (True and {}) E + where True = isinstance({}, dict)

testcase.name: test_documents_list_and_get

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 0 >= 1 + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa62bfa4dbc0>('count', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa62bfa4dbc0> = {'count': 0, 'documents': []}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_p0_unification.py:487: in test_documents_list_and_get assert lst.get("count", 0) >= 1 E AssertionError: assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa62bfa4dbc0>('count', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfa62bfa4dbc0> = {'count': 0, 'documents': []}.get

testcase.name: test_mempalace_search_finds_uploaded_document
testcase.failure: tests/test_p0_unification.py:513: in test_mempalace_search_finds_uploaded_document assert len(hits) >= 1, f"no documents-wing hits for our query; payload={d}" E AssertionError: no documents-wing hits for our query; payload={'count': 0, 'results': []} E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])
